video_title: From common problems to costs of parts,buying a Land Rover Discovery 4 Just got much,much easier!
transcript: right the first thing to check when you're looking at a discovery is the service books I know this goes for all cars but for the discovery it's particularly important now if there aren't any service books walk away You're basically looking here for a full service history it is really really important these cars need to be well maintained and inside of that service history you're looking for one very important item and that is this the cam belt being done it's a big expensive job because the cab has to come off of the chassis now it has to be done around 140 to 160,000 km and if it hasn't been done let's say you're looking at a car with 130,000 km you're going to have to do it really really soon so we founded a Land Rover specialist for 2015 cars are older he charges 19,000 and 2015 or newer because he has to separate the cab then he charges 25,000 Rand for that job so that's what you're looking at if you have to do the cam belt
